training_status: Consistent gym training, calorie counting, macro optimization

benefits.description: Edge taken off hunger, better hunger control week over week, reduced food noise during holidays
Lost from 218lbs down to 193lbs over the protocol; visually leaner around midsection and legs; belt noticeably shorter; body fat reduced including visceral and SubQ fat
Body composition scale indicated skeletal muscle gain while losing fat

protocol_notes: 57M, 6'0", on TRT + HCG. Started at 218lbs ~22-24% BF. Prior to peptide use reached 200lbs 18-20% BF through diet and gym. Added 1mg tirzepatide weekly from a 10mg vial. Bumped to 2mg one week (after Thanksgiving). Shifted dosing interval to every 5 days. Did not log meals during holidays but continued dosing. Final reported weight 193lbs with improved body composition. Does not plan long-term use.
